name: pgsA1
function: Glycosyltransferase/Phosphatidylinositol phosphate synthase/CDP-alcohol phosphotransferase involved in mycothiol/inositol-derived phospholipid/phosphatidylinositol biosynthesis (PMID: 31504463, 31098408).
infection_impact: Possible role for survival of M. tuberculosis in the ocular environment, contributing to pathogenesis of intraocular tuberculosis (PMID: 31504463).
